sourceStrategy.discovery: GDELT/public event rows find candidates, but they are noisy sensors.
sourceStrategy.primaryReviewEvidence: Reviewer opens the source URL or enough source context before a label can become ground truth.
sourceStrategy.curatedConflictEvidence: UCDP GED and UCDP Candidate are preferred open curated conflict evidence when their date coverage overlaps the event.
sourceStrategy.optionalContext: ACLED aggregates can provide trend context when local workbooks exist, but they are not row-level label truth.
sourceStrategy.avoidedForTruth: YouTube, X/Twitter, and generic social posts can be leads, but use them only as context unless the source is public, attributable, and independently checkable.
